name: VZ.806
in_game_description: A Czech modular assault rifle developed from the BREN 805. A high rate of fire and a lightweight design give the BREN 2 somewhat above average recoil, but excellent overall damage output. Model submitted by Mysterious Modeler X.

name: AN-94
in_game_description: A complex Russian assault rifle featuring a unique pulley-driven burst system. Fires two shots in the exact same place before recoil is felt.

in_game_description: A tactical upgrade to the SR-3M, with a large suppressor for the purpose of being used by Russian special-ops troops. High damage up close, but lacking damage at range.
